title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Jaipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
